productDisplayName: Nike Unisex Classic Turf Pink Backpack
description: If you want a bag that is funky, stylish, cool and comfortable to carry around all day, check out this pink backpack from nike. Carry it to college work or on a casual day out with your friends. A stunningly good looking bag and loads of space, it can become your best buddy in no time. Be prepared to be swept off your feet by this awesome backpack!  Measurement Height: 41 cm Width: 30 cm Depth: 21 cm Capacity: 21  litres  Made of 75% polyester and 25% nylon on the outside with 100% nylon lining for enhanced durability and style One main roomy zippered compartment with an organiser sleeve for essentials Zippered pouch on the front with an asymmetric opening for enhanced style and space for your essentialsOne mesh bottle holder on the side Branding in graphic print on the front and stitch detailing on the back Haul loop at the top for ease of carrying Padded, adjustable shoulders straps to absorb shock and cushion the shoulder, distributing loads more evenly Ergonomic design to Fit along the torso comfortably Branded zippers and sliders for easy use  Care Do not machine wash Rub surface with damp clean cloth to remove dust and dirt Do not bleach, line dry, iron or dry clean
